findings.description: The HTML output example showing how n:submitLink renders as anchor tags (with onclick="return window.nablarch_submit(event, this);") and the nablarch_hidden input structure is omitted. The source also includes the concrete note that 'ユーザ2のリンクが選択された場合は、リクエストパラメータとして「sampleId=U0002」が使用できる状態となる', which illustrates the end-to-end result of using n:param.
findings.source_evidence: Source HTML output block showing `<a name="R0001_0" href="./R0001" onclick="return window.nablarch_submit(event, this);">` ... `<input type="hidden" name="nablarch_hidden" value="・・・省略・・・" />` and the note about sampleId=U0002 being available as a request parameter.

findings.description: The default behavior of displayControlCheckers is omitted: when the displayControlCheckers property is not specified, the framework uses its default checker implementations (ServiceAvailabilityDisplayControlChecker and PermissionDisplayControlChecker). This is important because it tells developers that explicit configuration is optional.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「displayControlCheckersプロパティが指定されていない場合は、フレームワークがデフォルトでサポートしている判定処理を使用する。」
